steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank fills according to ______ trajectory. The blank contains modeling, a gerund (noun form of a verb), which requires a modifier showing who performs the modeling.

steps.title: Apply the possessive-gerund rule
steps.content:
A gerund must be modified by a possessive noun—so astronomers' modeling is correct, using plural possessive astronomers' because multiple astronomers are involved, and singular possessive object's because there is one object (2010 BL4).

The other choices either omit the possessive on astronomers, use singular astronomer's instead of plural, or use plural objects instead of singular.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
